Tests the `toString` method of the Boolean object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Boolean` object in JavaScript. It verifies that calling the `toString` method on a `Boolean` object created with the value `false` returns the string `"false"`. This is a narrow functionality test, focusing on the correctness of the `toString` method for a specific case. The code uses the `assert` function to ensure that the expected output matches the actual result, which is a common practice in unit testing to validate code behavior.
